description: A FOIA complaint case titled 'Public Records Request - Historical Budget Data' was previously denied and closed. Following an appeal from the original requester, the General Counsel has determined the case should be reopened for further processing. Identify the case using the case number found in /tmp/reopen_case_number.txt and reopen it in ArkCase by changing its status from 'Closed' to an active status. Add a note to the case with the following exact text: "Reopened per General Counsel directive. Appeal received from original requester on 2025-01-15. Additional records identified that were not included in original search. Case requires re-processing under expanded scope."

metadata.case_title: Public Records Request - Historical Budget Data
